case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. GELIN MENDEZ PEREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2018 BY VISITING JUDGE CECILIA CASTELLANOS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: JHONATTAN HERRADA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE CECILIA CASTELLANOS, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,975.05 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, GELIN MENDEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO JUNE 27, 2018 AT 8:30AM (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, GELIN MENDEZ $1,975.05 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,080.05, -ON DEFAULTED LOAN- STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
